items.q: What is the TP Club Chinese crypto community?
items.a: TP Club is a Chinese-first cryptocurrency Telegram community where members discuss markets daily, join live sessions, ask questions, and get market analysis and beginner support. Joining is free, and content is education-focused — not financial advice.

items.q: Where can I find an active Mandarin crypto Telegram community?
items.a: Look for transparent communities with daily discussions, real screenshots, live sessions, and no requests for passwords or fund access. TP Club offers 1,000+ members, active Chinese discussions, and a free Telegram join link.

items.q: Is this free? What do I need to pay?
items.a: Joining TP Club is completely free. There are no monthly fees charged by us, and the community content is education-focused.

items.q: Is this a scam? Is it safe?
items.a: We operate with full transparency — our educator shares education content inside the group, you keep full control of your own accounts and funds, and we never ask for login credentials or access to your funds.

No. TP Club is an educational crypto community. All content is for learning purposes only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, investment recommendations, account management, or guaranteed results.

items.q: I'm completely new to crypto education. Can I still join?
items.a: Absolutely — beginners are welcome! Our content is designed for people with zero prior experience. We explain beginner concepts, learning methods, market structure, and risk education step by step.

items.q: Can I ask questions before joining?
items.a: Yes! You can message us on Telegram before joining. We're happy to answer questions, explain what the community is about, and help you decide if TP Club is the right fit for you.

footer.disclaimer: Important: TP Club is an educational community. All content is for learning purposes only and does not constitute financial advice, investment recommendations, brokerage services, account management, or promises of profit. You keep control of your own accounts and funds, and TP Club will never ask for your password, seed phrase, private keys, or access to funds.

meta.title: Join TP Club Chinese Crypto Community
meta.intro: Join TP Club's Chinese-speaking Telegram community for daily crypto education, live trade training, market analysis, and beginner support.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TP Club keeps data collection minimal. This page explains what we collect when you contact us, join Telegram, or complete the education onboarding flow.

sections.title: Information we collect
sections.body: We may receive your name, Telegram handle, email address, and information you voluntarily send when contacting the education community. We do not ask for exchange passwords, seed phrases, private keys, or access to your funds.

sections.title: How we use it
sections.body: We use this information to respond to enquiries, confirm community access, provide education support, and improve our onboarding.

sections.title: Third-party services
sections.body: Telegram, hosting providers, and analytics tools may process information under their own privacy policies. Future tracking or analytics integrations will be managed from the admin area before being enabled.

sections.title: Educational disclaimer
sections.body: TP Club provides education only. We do not provide personalised financial advice, brokerage services, account management, or guaranteed results.

contact.title: Contact TP Club
contact.intro: Have a question before joining? Reach out through Telegram and continue the conversation inside the community.
contact.note: Never send passwords, private keys, seed phrases, or exchange login details.

admin.title: Admin Area
admin.intro: This private area is reserved for the single TP Club admin account. Management tools are planned but not enabled yet.

cards.title: Tracking Setup
cards.body: Connect or disconnect analytics, pixels, and campaign tracking tools from one place.

cards.title: Third-Party Integrations
cards.body: Manage Telegram, exchange referral, email, analytics, and future CRM integrations.

cards.title: Blog Management
cards.body: Draft, publish, and localize education articles for English and Chinese learners.

cards.title: Access Control
cards.body: Single-admin login and audit history will be added before this area becomes active.
